meaning: n.(花样滑冰中的)后内结环一周跳
examples: The first throw quad salchow Shen Xue and Zhao Hongbo attempted was flawless.
Few South Koreans know the difference between a triple axel and a triple salchow.
And cats are jealous of the reflexes she showed in saving the landing of her triple salchow.
His only flaw was a slightly underrotated quadruple salchow.
